userMessage: Reset scope, set CH1 500mV DC 50ohm, set CH2 1V AC, add frequency on CH1, run single sequence, save screenshot

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for (1/2)","params":{"command":"CH1:SCAle 0.5;CH1:COUPling DC"}},{"id":"3_2","type":"write","label":"Configure CH1 (2/2)","params":{"command":"CH1:TERmination 50"}}]},{"id":"4","type":"write","label":"Configure CH2","params":{"command":"CH2:SCAle 1;CH2:COUPling AC"}},{"id":"5","type":"group","label":"Configure acquisition/save","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"5_1","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save (1/2)","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence"}},{"id":"5_2","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save (2/2)","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STATE ON"}}]},{"id":"6","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"7","type":"group","label":"Add measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"m1","type":"write","label":"Add frequency measurement on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce1 CH1"}},{"id":"m2","type":"write","label":"Add frequency measurement on screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"9","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
